rounds.name: Round 1
points: Features 2 groups (Group A and Group B), each with 7 players randomly assigned.
The top 4 players from each group advance to Round 2.
Players ranked 5th and below are eliminated.

rounds.name: Round 2
points: Features 2 groups of 4 players each, assigned through a cross-group system: Group A gets 1st & 3rd from Group A, 2nd & 4th from Group B; Group B gets 1st & 3rd from Group B, 2nd & 4th from Group A.
Players from the same Round 1 group won't face each other again to avoid rematches.
The top 2 players from each group advance to the Semifinals.
